title: "Pretty nuts" to be in podium fight early on debut - Lindblad
summary: Racing Bulls newcomer Arvid Lindblad was fighting as high as third on the opening lap of his maiden F1 start.

title: Lawson says Perez still not over 2024 rivalry after Australian GP scrap
summary: Liam Lawson feels like Sergio Perez still hasn't got over their 2024 clashes – which culminated in Lawson replacing Perez at Red Bull – following a resumption of their battles in Melbourne.

title: When is racing not racing? F1's new regulations deliver a split verdict
summary: Chris Medland explores whether F1 racing is now too artificial, and whether drivers' opinions about driving satisfaction are worth considering.

title: Aston Martin encouraged by Honda's progress on vibration issues
summary: After Honda saw progress with its vibration issues, Aston Martin is confident it could have finished the Australian Grand Prix if it wasn’t managing its battery stock.

title: Cadillac ‘way ahead of where we really should be’ after F1 debut
summary: Cadillac's long journey to the Formula 1 grid is finally complete, now the real work starts – but from a good foundation.

title: No regrets from Ferrari drivers after staying out during VSC
summary: It looked as if Ferrari might have thrown away a win when it didn't pit during a VSC, but its drivers say Mercedes were always going to be tough to catch in the Australian Grand Prix.

title: Russell ‘lucky’ to not be worse off after poor start in the Australian GP
summary: George Russell had no battery and fell behind at the start of the Australian Grand Prix, but he was able to recover.

title: Piastri caught out by unexpected power in pre-race crash
summary: While Oscar Piastri took a significant portion of the blame for the crash that ruled him out of his home race, he said a surge of power from his car's new power unit also played a part.

title: Russell resists early Ferrari pressure to win Australian Grand Prix
summary: George Russell led a Mercedes one-two finish in the first grand prix of the season as Ferrari followed the Silver Arrows home.

title: How to watch the F1 Australian Grand Prix: Saturday
summary: Formula 1's 2026 season opener in Australia is set for tonight, for those of us in the USA. What sort of drama will the race from Melbourne deliver?
